name: date-picker
description: Copy custom formatted dates to your clipboard

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

commands.name: selectdate
commands.title: Select Date
commands.subtitle: Select a Date
commands.description: lets you decide which date to pick

preferences.name: dateFormat
preferences.title: Date Format
preferences.description: Format for the copied date (e.g., M.d.y)

title: Date Picker
author: JoBro
